heading: Step 3: Recover a .
body:
- Click the **Point in Time Restore** button on the far
  right side of the screen.

- Select either the **Date & Time** or **Oplog
  Timestamp** tab.

- Enter the desired point in time to restore from.

- Click the **Next: Select Cluster** button.

- Choose a project and cluster to restore to from the dropdown
  menus.

- Click the **Restore** button.
